chapter_title.en: Chapter on a Man Who Makes a Bequest of Wealth in the Way of Allah

text: 5478 - رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى بْنِ عُبَيْدٍ عَنِ اَلْحَسَنِ بْنِ رَاشِدٍ قَالَ : سَأَلْتُ أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ اَلْعَسْكَرِيَّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ أَوْصَى بِمَالٍ فِي سَبِيلِ اَللَّهِ فَقَالَ "سَبِيلُ اَللَّهِ شِيعَتُنَا ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5478 - Muhammad bin Isa bin Ubaid narrated from Al-Hasan bin Rashid, who said:
I asked Abu Al-Hasan Al-Askari, (Imam Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Hadi (as)) about a man who made a will to dedicate wealth "in the way of Allah (swt)" (fi sabeelillah).
Imam (as) replied: "The way of Allah (swt) is our Shia (followers)."
